# SINator — Fireworks AI Key Pool

> Automated GMX alias rotation, Fireworks AI account registration, and API key pool with OpenAI-compatible proxy.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/SIN-Rotator/SINator-FireworksAI/blob/main/README.md) - Quick start, features, architecture
- [Architecture](https://github.com/SIN-Rotator/SINator-FireworksAI/blob/main/docs/) - Detailed design docs
- [Cloudflare Fallback](https://github.com/SIN-Rotator/SINator-FireworksAI/blob/main/cloudflare/README.md) - Worker + D1 setup
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/SIN-Rotator/SINator-FireworksAI/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md) - Known issues and fixes
- [Pool Router](https://github.com/SIN-Rotator/SINator-FireworksAI/blob/main/docs/router.md) - Router configuration

## Key Information

- License: MIT
- Language: Python 3.12+
- Framework: FastAPI + Playwright CDP
- Protocol: OpenAI-compatible API
- Pool: 484 keys, 10 proxies, auto-failover
- Repo: https://github.com/SIN-Rotator/SINator-FireworksAI

## Architecture

- Backend: FastAPI on :8100 (PoolManager + Keychain)
- Router: Python on :9998 (10-proxy auto-failover)
- Proxies: aiohttp on :8888-:8897 (silent key swap)
- Automation: Playwright CDP (GMX + Fireworks signup)
- Fallback: Cloudflare Worker + D1 (Mac offline scenario)

## Endpoints

- Pool Stats: GET /api/v1/pool/stats
- Pool Keys: GET /api/v1/pool/keys
- Inference: POST /inference/v1/chat/completions (OpenAI-compatible)
- Backend Docs: http://localhost:8100/docs (Swagger)

## Companion Repos

- Dashboard: https://github.com/SIN-Rotator/SINator-dashboard
- OpenCode Config: https://github.com/OpenSIN-Code/SIN-Code-FireworksAI-OpenCode-Config
- Hermes Bundle: https://github.com/SIN-Hermes-Bundles/SIN-Hermes-Provider-Bundle
